testcase.name: Categories API /api/v1/categories get categories listed returns a 200 response
News API /api/v1/news post news created returns a 201 response
News API /api/v1/news get news listed returns a 200 response
News API /api/v1/news/{id} delete news deleted returns a 204 response
News API /api/v1/news/{id} get news found returns a 200 response
Fundraisers API /api/v1/fundraisers post fundraiser created returns a 201 response
Fundraisers API /api/v1/fundraisers get fundraisers listed returns a 200 response
Fundraisers API /api/v1/fundraisers/{id} get fundraiser found returns a 200 response
Fundraisers API /api/v1/fundraisers/{id} delete fundraiser deleted returns a 204 response
Comments API /api/v1/tickets/{ticket_id}/comments get comments listed returns a 200 response
Comments API /api/v1/tickets/{ticket_id}/comments post comment created returns a 201 response
Users API /api/v1/users/{id} get user found returns a 200 response
Users API /api/v1/users/{id} delete user deleted returns a 204 response
Users API /api/v1/users/{id} patch user updated returns a 200 response
Users API /api/v1/users post user registered returns a 201 response
Users API /api/v1/users get users listed returns a 200 response
Auth API /api/v1/login post invalid credentials returns a 401 response
Auth API /api/v1/login post signed in returns a 200 response
Auth API /api/v1/logout delete signed out returns a 200 response
Tickets API /api/v1/tickets/{id} patch ticket updated returns a 200 response
Tickets API /api/v1/tickets/{id} get ticket found returns a 200 response
Tickets API /api/v1/tickets/{id} delete ticket deleted returns a 204 response
Tickets API /api/v1/tickets post ticket created returns a 201 response
Tickets API /api/v1/tickets get tickets listed returns a 200 response
Search API /api/v1/search get search results returns a 200 response
